entries.source: "Check my essay thesis"
entries.value: "Hubi maqaal aragtida qoraalka-kayga"

entries.source: "Give me a hint for this physics problem"
entries.value: "I sii tilmaan loogu talagalay tan fiisigis problem"

entries.source: "Help me start this word problem"
entries.value: "Iga caawi bilow tan word problem"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Homework Coach on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Hage wax ku ool ah oo ku saabsan isticmaalka Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga gudaha inspir si loo barto tababarka, oo leh prompts, wareegyo waxbarasho, iyo caadooyin AI oo ammaan badan.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ka xooggan wareeg waxbarasho

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck on homework with hints, examples, and checks that help you do the thinking yourself.
entries.value: Tababaraha Shaqo-guri AI leh tilmaamo, ma shubista jawaabaha waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Get unstuck ku homework leh tilmaamo, tusaalooyin, iyo hubinno taas caawin aad do thinking yourself.

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: practical guide
entries.value: Tababaraha Shaqo-guri AI leh tilmaamo, ma shubista jawaabaha: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Macallin AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: weydii loogu talagalay yar koowaad step rather ka badan jawaab kama dambays ah.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi kaaga reasoning, ma just result.

entries.source: Find the next step.
entries.value: Raadi tallaabada xigta.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish by qoraal fikrad back ka yimid xusuus.

entries.source: Homework Coach
entries.value: Tababaraha Shaqada Guriga

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Ku celceli

entries.source: Practice a similar problem.
entries.value: Ku tababar similar problem.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts si isku day

entries.source: Start the live mode at Homework Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Math Step Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Ka bilow qaabka tooska ah ee Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga. Haddii aad rabto qaab waxbarasho oo u dhow, isku day Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta. Si aad aragti ballaaran uga hesho madasha, akhri waxa wehel waxbarasho AI uu qof walba u qaban karo.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.
entries.value: Ardayda u baahan caawimaad si ay u bilaabaan dhibaatada, u hubiyaan shaqada, ama u fahmaan khalad.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell qaab waxa aad waa trying si baro ama produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: taas difference shows up gudaha flow. halkii ee hal giant response, ugu fiican sessions move iyada oo loo marayo loop: set yool, isku day something, get jawaab-celin, repair daciif spot, iyo dooro xiga action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: taas focus matters. general chatbot wuu karaa jawaab almost anything, laakiin qaab waxbarasho siiyaa wada-hadal shape. taas nudges aad toward kind ee thinking, tababar, jawaab-celin, ama sahan taas caawisaa fikrad stick.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Tababaruhu wuxuu taageeraa fikirkaaga isagoon la wareegin hawsha, si shaqada ugu dambaysa ay u ahaato mid adiga kuu gaar ah.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: tan waa isku mid caado behind studying leh AI iyadoo aan khiyaano lahayn yourself: keep arday active. AI waa most waxtar leh marka taas siiyaa aad jawaab-celin ku kaaga thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: tan qaab waa especially waxtar leh loogu talagalay ardayda yaa rabto si:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: isku day step gudaha kaaga u gaar ah erayo.

entries.source: Understand the mistake.
entries.value: Understand qalad.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Isticmaal Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga marka aad rabto kalfadhi si degdeg ah u bilaabma isla markaana adiga kula qabsada. Yoolka koowaad ma aha in la dhawaaqo si cajaa'ib leh. Yoolka koowaad waa in tallaabada xigta laga dhigo mid suuragal u muuqata.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: waxa tan qaab caawisaa leh

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: halkee si go xiga

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: aad wuu karaa also bilow leh rough version ee kaaga dhab ah problem. messy koowaad prompt waa fine. session wuu karaa clarify heer, dhagaystayaal, waqti kama dambays ah, iyo style once aad begin.
